_comment: Microsoft Entra External ID — profile-editing experience. In External ID, profile self-service is exposed by the My Account portal + Microsoft Graph PATCH /me. Substitutes the legacy Azure AD B2C custom policy 'B2C_1A_ProfileEdit'. This file declares which user attributes are editable and which are read-only.
_todo_case_study_scaffold: If you expose a custom profile-edit page in the citizen web portal, this file is consumed by the API gateway to enforce server-side write filtering.
Read-only attributes are populated by the eIDAS bridge custom-extension on first sign-in and must never be patchable from the citizen UI.
